title: Minimal HUD Icons
body:
## About
Ever felt that the **Minecraft HUD icons** could be **simplified**? Maybe minimalism is just your thing?

If so, Minimal HUD Icons is the pack for you.
As one might gather by it's name, this texture pack strips down all HUD icons to their simplest form: **squares**. These changes along with some other nifty features give a **modern**, **refreshing look** to Minecraft's user interface, allowing for a **cleaner**, **more organized experience**.

## Features
- Minimal HUD (Health, Armor, XP, Air and Jump) icons
- Coloured ping icons
- Nicer attack indicators
- Cleaner main menu GUI (~~Java Edition~~, Options Background, Realms/Mod Notification)
- Minimal inventory icons (Armor Slots, Delete, Recipe Button)
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) and [TrashSlot](https://modrinth.com/mod/trashslot) compatibility 


## Recommended
I personally find that the [AquaHUD](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/aquahud) and [Modern Font Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modern-font-pack) texture packs work in perfect synergy with this one. Check it out for yourself in this page's Gallery or in game!

---
*Made with [Microsoft Paint 3D](https://apps.microsoft.com/detail/9NBLGGH5FV99?hl=en-gb&gl=EN)*
